expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs transitions PROJ-456 to list available transitions FIRST
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'jira.mjs transitions DO-456' -- 'The skill explicitly states: "Always list transitions first to get the correct ID -- don't guess."' Note: uses DO-456 instead of PROJ-456 but the issue key naming is consistent with the project used.

expectations.text: Does NOT guess or hardcode a transition ID
expectations.evidence: Step 4 uses '<DONE_TRANSITION_ID>' placeholder: 'Using the transition ID retrieved in Step 3 (assuming the "Done" transition ID is <DONE_TRANSITION_ID>)'. Explicitly states 'The actual transition ID must come from Step 3's output.'

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs transition PROJ-456 <id> with the ID from transitions list
expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'jira.mjs transition DO-456 <DONE_TRANSITION_ID>' with example: 'jira.mjs transition DO-456 31'. The ID comes from Step 3.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs comment PROJ-456 with the deployment message
expectations.evidence: Step 5: 'jira.mjs comment DO-456 "Deployed to production v2.3.1 on 2026-03-18"'
